## edu-cli teacher list-applications

List teacher join applications for a class (班级教师加入申请列表)

```
edu-cli teacher list-applications [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --class-id uint   Class ID (required)
  -h, --help            help for list-applications
      --page int        Page number (default 1)
      --page-size int   Page size (default 20)
```
